displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 7
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Blood Ties (2010) #1-4; Star Wars: Blood Ties – Boba Fett Is Dead (2012) #1-4; Star Wars: Empire (2002) #1-4; Star Wars: Underworld – The Yavin Vassilika (2000) #1-5; Free Comic Book Day: Star Wars 2013; material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #1-2, 6, 16.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 7
